name: Deluxe King Suite
description: Experience luxury in our Deluxe King Suite. Featuring a spacious layout, panoramic city views, and a king-sized bed with premium linens.

name: Executive Ocean View
description: Wake up to the sound of waves in our Executive Ocean View room. Perfect for business and leisure, offering a dedicated workspace and private balcony.

name: Presidential Penthouse
description: The ultimate in opulence. Our Presidential Penthouse offers unmatched privacy, a private terrace with a jacuzzi, and 24/7 butler service.

name: Standard Double Room
description: Comfort and style meet in our Standard Double Room. Ideal for couples or solo travelers looking for a cozy retreat.
